# DVHIVE - Independent Certified Auto Appraisers
DVHIVE provides nationwide certified auto appraisals for diminished value and total loss insurance claims.

## Key Services
- **Diminished Value Claims**: Independent appraisals to recover lost market value after vehicle repairs. [https://www.dvhive.com/diminished-value]
- **Total Loss Valuations**: Expert reports and appraisal clause representation for totaled vehicles. [https://www.dvhive.com/total-loss]
- **Nationwide Service**: Licensed appraisers serving all 50 U.S. states. [https://www.dvhive.com/states]

## Contact Information
- Phone: +1 (888) 597-3282
- Email: info@dvhive.com
- Website: https://www.dvhive.com
